Debug.Name: Enable debug logs
Debug.Hint: Write additional Multi-Hit Spell Level Scaler diagnostics to the browser console.

HeaderButton.TooltipInvalid: Multi-Hit enabled, but setup is incomplete

SpellConfig.Title: Multi-Hit: {itemName}
SpellConfig.ActivityHintAvailable: Each hit will reuse this activity.
SpellConfig.ActivityHintMissing: This spell currently has no usable activities.
SpellConfig.DerivedBaseLevel: The base spell level is derived automatically from spell level {spellLevel}.

ExtraHitPrompt.Title: Remaining hits: {itemName}
ExtraHitPrompt.NextHitHint: Next Hit uses the currently selected target.
ExtraHitPrompt.ResolveAllHint: Resolve All spends 1 hit per selected target, or all remaining hits on the only selected target.
ExtraHitPrompt.SelectionHint: Your selection must never exceed the number of available hits.

Notifications.ConfigTargetRange: Select between 1 and {totalHits} target(s) before casting this configured spell.
Notifications.ConfigTooManyTargets: You selected {selectedCount} target(s), but this cast only provides {totalHits} hit(s). Reduce your selection and try again.
Notifications.InitialTargetPrepareFailed: The initial target could not be prepared for a controlled single-target cast.
Notifications.TargetUnresolved: A selected target could no longer be resolved.
Notifications.TargetOffScene: The selected target is no longer on the active scene.
Notifications.NextHitSelectOne: Select exactly one target before resolving the next hit.
Notifications.SingleHitTooManyTargets: Only one target can be selected when resolving a single hit.
Notifications.RemainingHitsSelectAtLeastOne: Select at least one target before resolving the remaining hits.
Notifications.TooManyTargetsForRemainingHits: You selected {selectedCount} target(s), but only {remaining} hit(s) remain. Reduce your selection and try again.
Notifications.MissingContext: The hit context no longer exists.
Notifications.ForbiddenUser: Only the user who created this cast context can resolve its remaining hits.
Notifications.UnsupportedResolutionMode: Resolution mode "{mode}" is not supported here.
Notifications.NoHitsRemaining: No hits remain in this context.
Notifications.MissingDocuments: The spell item or hit activity could not be resolved for this context.
Notifications.TemplateActivitiesUnsupported: Template-based hit activities are not supported in this controlled resolution flow.
Notifications.ActivityUseCancelled: The hit was not resolved because the dnd5e activity did not complete.
